properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How beautiful this love You would lay down your crown Surrender your throne in Heaven So that I could be found

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How awesome is this love That conquered the grave Love that can move the mountains Yet knows me by name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's unbreakable It's undeniable Nothing will ever Separate us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your love is higher Than the skies up above Your love is wider Than what I can dream of Your love is deeper It's the greatest of all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your love is higher Than the skies up above Your love is wider Than what I can dream of Your love is deeper It's the greatest of all Greatest of all

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy are you Father A love like no other So vast like the universe Is your love, is your love
